## Summary

<!-- What changed and why? Keep this focused on behavior and intent. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat (new functionality)
- [ ] fix (bug fix)
- [ ] docs (documentation only)
- [ ] refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] test (tests only)
- [ ] chore (maintenance)
- [ ] breaking change

## Conventional Commit check

- [ ] My commits follow Conventional Commits (for example: `feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`).
- [ ] If this PR introduces a breaking change, I used `!` or `BREAKING CHANGE:` in commit messages.

## Release and changelog impact

- [ ] I validated the release impact (patch/minor/major) based on commit messages.
- [ ] Changelog wording is clear from commit titles (Release Please will generate entries).

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test:run`
- [ ] Manual verification completed (if applicable)

## Screenshots / recordings (if UI changes)

<!-- Add before/after screenshots or short videos when relevant. -->

## Linked issues

<!-- Example: Closes #123 -->
